RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS KENNETH AKIZUKI, M.D. AND SPORTS ORTHOPEDIC AND REHABILITATION MEDICINE ASSOCIATES' Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses is Granted as to RFP 37. Plaintiff must produce all non-privilege responsive documents within 30 days, to the extent all documents are withheld on the grounds of privilege, Plaintiff must provide a privilege log. The motion is moot as to SI 22. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Not reported = (301/EHG)

ATTY. JOANNA L. STOREY OF THE HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP, TEL. NO. 288-9800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS KENNETH AKIZUKI AND SPORTS ORTHOPEDIC AND REHABILITATION MEDICINE ASSOCIATES' Amended Motion To Compel Compliance With Document Subpoena is Granted in part. Records if any, subsequent to 10/10/09 specifically referring to plaintiff's knee injury or infection must be produced but may be redacted to exclude other matters. Otherwise, Denied. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
